description: Boot sequence skipped Plaud ingest workflow launch entirely. Protocol requires launching it as a background Agent and reporting 'Plaud ingest failed to launch' if it errors. Neither happened — the step was omitted from the briefing without acknowledgment.
correction: Read workflows/plaud-ingest/workflow.md and launch as background Agent during Phase 2. If the workflow cannot run (credential/sandbox blocker), report the failure explicitly in the briefing. Never silently omit a required boot step.
systemic_fix: Added Plaud ingest to boot Phase 2 parallel execution list. Failure mode is documented — Knox cannot reach Plaud API from Cowork sandbox. Failure should be surfaced in briefing, not silently dropped.
